full_description: Mood Tracker is a simple and easy-to-use app designed to help you track your daily emotions and moods. By monitoring your feelings over time, you can identify patterns and gain valuable insights into what affects your mental well-being. This information can be used to make positive changes and improve your overall mood. The app allows you to log your emotions and view them in a calendar or graph format, making it easy to spot trends and patterns. With Mood Tracker, you can take the first step towards a happier, healthier you.
